plan.caption:
A Brilliant Stars ETB costs $166 sealed. Crack it open and you average $50 in expected value. That is a $116 gap working against you every time you pull the tab.

PokeEV.com runs the numbers so you do not have to guess. Eight packs, a booster EV of $6.31 each, and chase cards like Charizard V ($346), Umbreon VMAX ($111), and Mimikyu V ($85) sitting deep in the pull rates. The math is clear: sealed value wins here by a wide margin.

Verdict: KEEP IT SEALED. Unless you are cracking for the experience, this Elite Trainer Box earns its place on the shelf.

Would you rip it or hold it? Drop your answer below.

Full set breakdowns and sealed vs. open EV at pokeev.com. Link in bio.
